description_long: This object is a modern, tactical shotgun with a distinctive bullpup configuration, featuring a compact design where the action and magazine are located behind the trigger. The shotgun has a prominent integrated carry handle running along the top, which also houses the rear sight. Its body is primarily matte black, with a ribbed fore-end for improved grip and a box magazine inserted just in front of the stock. The barrel is relatively short and ends with a simple muzzle, while the stock is angular and robust, designed for stability and control. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and the overall construction suggests a focus on durability and ease of handling in urban environments.
description: A compact, black bullpup shotgun with an integrated carry handle, ribbed fore-end, and box magazine, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, muzzle, and the alignment of the carry handle above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, integrated carry handle, ribbed fore-end, box magazine, and angular stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the stock, the magazine, and the symmetry of the handle and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger, magazine, and handle structure.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with smooth edges and ample space
